title: Loading States and Displaying Data
description: Manage loading indicators and render fetched data in components.

slides.title: User Experience Matters ⏳
slides.content:
# Don't Leave Users Guessing

When fetching data, there's a delay. Show a **loading indicator** so users know something is happening. Also handle empty states and errors gracefully.

Common states:
- `loading`: true while fetching
- `data`: the fetched data (or null)
- `error`: error message if any

slides.title: Loading State Implementation
Displaying Data in Lists

quizData.question: Why do we need a loading state?

options.text: To inform users that data is being fetched

quizData.explanation: Loading states improve UX by showing that work is in progress, preventing blank screens.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: Use `ActivityIndicator` for a spinner. You can also use skeleton placeholders for a more polished look.
